summary: Comprehensive testing of Report Templates and Inspection Templates (Questionnaires) features. All 11 features tested and verified working. Backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and Frontend UI (all features functional). Fixed backend bug where inspection templates required valid partner_id - now accepts 'placeholder' value.
critical_code_review_comments: All Report Templates and Inspection Templates features implemented correctly
Backend APIs properly handle CRUD operations for both report templates and inspection templates
Report Templates correctly connect Partner + Inspection Template + Report Style
3 report styles (Standard-blue, Premium-purple, Detailed-green) with visual cards and feature lists
Inspection Templates modal correctly removed Partner/Client selection
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Stats cards update correctly when data changes
seed_data_creation: 3 report templates seeded: B2C Standard Report, B2C Premium Report (Default), B2C Detailed Technical Report
context_for_next_testing_agent: Report Templates and Inspection Templates features fully tested. Existing data: 3 report templates (Standard, Premium-default, Detailed), 3 inspection templates (B2C Default Inspection, ICICI Bank Vehicle Inspection-default, New test template for MFCWL-inactive). Complete flow: Partners → Inspection Templates (Questions only) → Report Templates (connects Partner + Inspection Template + Report Style).

features_tested.Services_Tab_7_Tabs: PASS - Services tab shows all 7 tabs: Packages, Categories, Offers, Inspection Q&A, Partners, Inspection Templates, Report Templates
features_tested.Report_Templates_Stats: PASS - Shows Total Templates (3), Active (3), Report Styles (3), Partners Covered (1)
features_tested.Report_Templates_Create_Sample_Button: PASS - 'Create Sample Templates' button available when empty
features_tested.Report_Templates_3_Styles: PASS - Displays 3 seeded templates with different styles (Standard-blue, Premium-purple, Detailed-green)
features_tested.Report_Templates_Modal_3_Sections: PASS - Create modal has 3 sections: Basic Info, Select Report Style, Status
features_tested.Report_Templates_Modal_Section1: PASS - Section 1 has: Name, Partner/Client dropdown, Inspection Template dropdown, Description
features_tested.Report_Templates_Modal_Section2: PASS - Section 2 shows 3 visual style cards (Standard, Premium, Detailed) with features list
features_tested.Report_Templates_View_Report: PASS - View Report button opens preview modal showing template configuration
features_tested.Inspection_Templates_Questionnaires_Term: PASS - Tab renamed to show 'Questionnaires' terminology (Total Questionnaires, Create Questionnaire, Search questionnaires)
features_tested.Inspection_Templates_No_Partner_Selectio: PASS - Modal does NOT have Partner/Client selection (removed)
features_tested.Inspection_Templates_Modal_Fields: PASS - Modal has: Name, Description, Select Questions by category, Active/Default toggles

backend_fix_applied.issue: Inspection templates API required valid partner_id, but frontend sends 'placeholder' since Partner selection was removed from modal
backend_fix_applied.fix: Modified create_inspection_template and update_inspection_template to skip partner validation when partner_id is 'placeholder'

screenshots_taken: 03_report_templates_page.png - Report Templates with stats and 3 templates
04_create_report_template_modal.png - Modal with 3 sections and style cards
07_create_questionnaire_modal.png - Modal without Partner selection, with question categories
